chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Revision Application No.230 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For hearing of bail application 2. For hearing of M.A. No.1385 of 2025 (561-A) ------------------------- 04.02.2026 Mr. Mohsin Ali Soomro, advocate for applicant ------------------------------------ Applicant Nasrullah son of Mamo Jat is complainant of ID Complaint No.07/2025. Learned trial Court has dismissed the said complaint vide order dated 10.09.2025, thereafter, he has preferred this criminal revision application and notices were issued to the private respondents/accused. During pendency of instant criminal revision application, respondents 1 to 7 have filed their undertaking/ affidavit, which reveal that they are ready to handover the peaceful vacant possession of the subject land/property to the applicant and shall not obstruct or block the way of the applicant in any manner. In view of such undertaking/ affidavit, learned counsel for applicant does not press this criminal revision application, which is accordingly dismissed, along with pending application(s). J U D G E Gulsher/PS
